description: Use the N/encode module to convert a string to another type of encoding. This module exposes string encoding and decoding functionality.

methods.name: convert
methods.description: Converts a string to another type of encoding and returns the re-encoded string.

params.name: options.inputEncoding
params.description: The encoding used for the input string. Use encode.Encoding to set the value.

params.name: options.outputEncoding
params.description: The encoding to apply to the output string. Use encode.Encoding to set the value.

enums.name: Encoding
enums.description: Holds the string values for the supported character set encoding. Use this enum to set the inputEncoding and outputEncoding parameter values in N/crypto or N/encode modules.

members.name: BASE_64_URL_SAFE
members.description: URL-safe Base 64 encoding. Uses different character set: + replaced with -, / replaced with _. Padding represented by =.
